assertions.details: Profile creation flow works - user enters name in onboarding, profile is created and persisted. Browser screenshot shows profile created with name 'TestValidator'. API verification confirms profile exists with correct data.
PUT /api/profile with id, name, bio updates profile successfully. Response shows updated name and bio with updated_at timestamp. GET /api/profile confirms changes persist.
Submitting profile with empty name shows validation error. Browser screenshot shows validation error message. API returns 400 with 'Name is required' error.
After clearing data, visiting http://localhost:3101 shows onboarding screen to create profile. Browser screenshot shows onboarding UI with name input field.
SQLite database exists at data/openmarcus.db. Schema verified with correct tables: profiles, sessions, messages, action_items, stoic_content. Foreign keys and indexes properly defined.
Complete session (4 messages, summary, action items) persists in database immediately after ending. GET /api/sessions/:id returns full session with all messages, summary, and action items intact.
Profile changes (name edit from 'TestValidator' to 'TestUserEdited') persist in database. GET /api/profile returns updated profile with correct updated_at timestamp.
GET /api/export returns JSON with version, exportDate, profiles (1), sessions (1), messages (2), actionItems (0), content (60). Export format is complete and valid JSON.
After clearing all data, POST /api/export/import with exported JSON restores all data. Profile count: 1, sessions: 1, messages: 2. GET /api/profile confirms restored profile matches original.

POST /api/export/clear clears all user data (profiles: 1, sessions: 1, messages: 4 cleared). After clear, GET /api/profile returns 404 'Profile not found', GET /api/sessions returns empty array. Note: Backend does not require confirmation - frontend shows confirmation dialog before calling API.

GET /api/sessions returns session list with metadata: session ID, status, summary, started_at, ended_at, message_count, and first_message preview. Session data includes: status 'summary', 4 messages, first message 'I am struggling with anxiety about the future'.
GET /api/sessions/:id returns full session with all 4 messages loaded correctly, including summary and action_items. Messages ordered by created_at with correct role and content.
Browser screenshot shows warm stone/marble color palette (cream, tan, charcoal), serif typography, and clean minimal design consistent with ancient Rome aesthetic.
Loading spinner visible during async operations. Browser screenshot captures loading state during profile save or data load operation.
Error toast notification appears at bottom of screen when errors occur. Browser screenshot shows error toast with message.

notes: Ollama was offline - meditation sessions requiring AI interaction were not tested. Session UI was verified with API-seeded data.
Backend had ESM compatibility bug in session.ts (require not defined). Fixed by adding createRequire from 'module'. This is an existing code issue unrelated to feature implementation.
Profile edit API requires 'id' in request body, which is a design choice since there's no explicit 'current profile' concept in the schema.
Clear all data endpoint does not require confirmation backend-side; confirmation is frontend-only.
Data export is GET not POST - endpoint is GET /api/export returning JSON directly.
